user.title: Auckland Council Collection Schedule
user.description:
Configure Auckland Council rubbish collection information.

**Need help finding your Property ID?** Visit the [Auckland Council collection days page](https://www.aucklandcouncil.govt.nz/en/rubbish-recycling/rubbish-recycling-collections/rubbish-recycling-collection-days.html) and search for your address. The Property ID will be shown in the URL once you find your property.

error.invalid_property_id: Property ID must be a number between 5 and 15 digits
error.invalid_time_format: Time must be in HH:MM format (e.g., 07:00)
